viral_opportunities.title: @BillionMagazine: Author: @BillionMagazine | Text: Meticulously crafted by architect and designer...
viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @BillionMagazine | Text: Meticulously crafted by architect and designer Peter Marino with construction led by Peter McCoy, this decade-long project reached completion in 2018.

Perched on an 8 acre flat promontory, the estate offers complete privacy and unobstructed views across Los Angeles, from downtown to the Pacific Ocean and overlooking the Bel Air Country Club.
Widely regarded as one of the most expensive single-family residences ever built in the United States, it spans over 70,00
viral_opportunities.author: @BillionMagazine
viral_opportunities.summary: Feature on a decade-long luxury residence crafted by architect Peter Marino, perched on a dramatic site, completed 2018.
viral_opportunities.engagement_angle: Prime design-cluster engagement: comment on Marino's material palette, siting, and craft — draw parallel to concrete-villa massing and light.

viral_reply.body: Peter Marino on an 8-acre Bel Air promontory — a decade of craft shows in that massing and siting. One of the great LA estates.
viral_reply.why: Bel Air trophy estate, HNW audience

viral_opportunities.title: @HomeAdore: Author: @HomeAdore | Text: Lawrence Park: Modern Minimalist House Design in Toro...
viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @HomeAdore | Text: Lawrence Park: Modern Minimalist House Design in Toronto

https://homeadore.com/2024/02/25/lawrence-park-modern-minimalist-house-design-in-toronto/ | URL: https://x.com/HomeAdore/status/2080061930211832139 | Date: 2026-07-22 | Likes: 72 | Retweets: 8 | Replies: 0 | Views: 8462 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @HomeAdore

viral_reply.body: Lovely restraint here — the way the minimalist volumes hold their proportions lets the material do the talking. Clean, considered work.
viral_reply.why: Minimalist architecture, but Toronto not LA

viral_opportunities.title: @therossg: Author: @therossg | Text: If you can overcome all the red tape to rebuild your h...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @therossg | Text: If you can overcome all the red tape to rebuild your home in Pacific Palisades, LADWP will delay you going home. We demand changes now! | URL: https://x.com/therossg/status/2078395871205495179 | Date: 2026-07-18 | Likes: 109 | Retweets: 17 | Replies: 2 | Views: 4165 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @therossg

viral_reply.body: The utility timeline is one of the most underestimated pieces of the rebuild. Real momentum only comes when permitting and power move in step. Hope relief comes fast.

viral_opportunities.title: @lrntex: Author: @lrntex | Text: The FAIR plan--which came into existence as a last resor...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @lrntex | Text: The FAIR plan--which came into existence as a last resort insurer for people of color who could not get insurance because of racism--is now overwhelmingly used to subsidize coverage for luxury homes in Tahoe, Malibu and Calabasas. | URL: https://x.com/lrntex/status/2080024492030701956 | Date: 2026-07-22 | Likes: 8 | Retweets: 3 | Replies: 1 | Views: 473 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @lrntex

viral_reply.body: The FAIR plan strain is real — non-combustible assemblies and verified WPH Plus hardening measurably lower loss, which is one of the few levers that eases the whole pool.

viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @OneKindesign | Text: Luxurious hillside home boasts jaw-dropping views over the LA Skyline 
https://onekindesign.com/luxurious-hillside-home-california/ | URL: https://x.com/OneKindesign/status/2078715965865378072 | Date: 2026-07-19 | Likes: 10 | Retweets: 5 | Replies: 0 | Views: 1141 | Author followers: 0

viral_reply.body: That skyline frontage is doing a lot of work — the way the living volumes open to the view is beautifully judged for a hillside site.
viral_reply.why: LA hillside luxury home, buyer audience

viral_opportunities.title: @dillonliam: Author: @dillonliam | Text: Rebuilding in Pacific Palisades and Altadena from th...
viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @dillonliam | Text: Rebuilding in Pacific Palisades and Altadena from the 2025 LA wildfires is close or at to some milestones, per @politico's tracker:

* 148 completed homes
* Almost half of the 9,900 properties with destroyed homes have filed permits to rebuild | URL: https://x.com/dillonliam/status/2079244608962539938 | Date: 2026-07-20 | Likes: 3 | Retweets: 2 | Replies: 2 | Views: 1280 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @dillonliam

viral_reply.body: Permit filings crossing half is a real inflection point. The gap between filed and completed is where material and assembly choices really shape the pace.

viral_opportunities.title: @Debi_Calvet: Author: @Debi_Calvet | Text: When we went under contract for our Florida home, w...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @Debi_Calvet | Text: When we went under contract for our Florida home, we had no idea of the state’s strict construction rules. Photos of our exterior walls in reinforced concrete-block masonry stunned us. My native California, which we left last May, could learn so much from Florida. | URL: https://x.com/Debi_Calvet/status/1881879397986431135 | Date: 2025-01-22 | Likes: 9 | Retweets: 0 | Replies: 0 | Views: 142 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @Debi_Calvet

viral_reply.body: Florida's masonry codes are a great reference point — reinforced concrete assemblies change the whole risk picture. California's rebuild is a real chance to raise that bar.
